name: multi-field-atom-brick-allocator-refined
description: Wave 1 / E1 Step 7 — multi-field-three-atlas-atoms regression with sub-brick refinement on. Combines `useAtomBrickAllocator: true` with `subBrickRefinement: true` (interval trigger, threshold 2.0, maxDepth 1) — the full per-atom sub-brick subdivision path. Each atom intersecting a cell flagged for refinement gets its own pool node (Step 6a's ownerAtomIndex API) with its own 8 child atlas slots; the WGSL `sampleAtomAtlasCascade` (Step 6c) descends per-atom rather than sharing a single subdivided cell across all overlapping atoms. Pre-Step-6 only one atom per shared cell would render correctly post-subdivision (last-write-wins); post-Step-6 all overlapping atoms render with sub-brick detail.

commands: window.__canarySetDisplayState({ render: { subBrickRefinement: true, subBrickTrigger: 'interval', subBrickThreshold: 2.0, subBrickMaxDepth: 1 } })
